news.title: 5 hurt after car speeding away from police crashes into MARTA bus
news.summary: Atlanta police say the suspect car sped off shortly before crashing.

news.title: Big Tigger's estranged wife arrested on Maryland kidnapping warrants
news.summary: The estranged wife of Atlanta radio host Big Tigger was arrested Monday in northeast Georgia during a traffic stop on kidnapping charges out of Maryland.

news.title: Fleeing driver crashes into MARTA bus leaving 5 injured
news.summary: A driver running from police crashed into a MARTA bus Tuesday afternoon, injuring five people and sparking an investigation in northwest Atlanta.

news.title: Most Wanted suspect caught when police chase ends in fiery crash
news.summary: A murder suspect once considered one of Atlanta’s Most Wanted fugitives is out of the hospital and in jail after a police chase ended in a fiery crash.

news.title: Suspect arrested after man found shot to death behind DeKalb store
news.summary: A DeKalb County family is searching for answers after a man was found shot to death behind a Memorial Drive automotive business.

news.title: Grieving DeKalb mother calls son's killer 'a coward'
news.summary: DeKalb County police are searching for the gunman who shot and killed a local trucker nearly one year ago, leaving his family desperate for justice.

news.title: DeKalb County gang member sentenced to 95 years in prison
news.summary: Darius Scott, 35, will spend the next 95 years in prison, according to an announcement from Georgia Attorney General Chris Carr.

news.title: Arrest made after sleepover shooting that killed 13-year-old and adult
news.summary: The DeKalb County Sheriff’s Office says they have arrested a man for opening fire on a sleepover, killing a teenage boy and a man.

news.title: Suspect arrested for rape possessed gun linked to Decatur murder, warrants reveal
news.summary: According to warrants, the suspect was arrested for rape, and during a search, officers found a gun on him, which connected him to the murder.

news.title: Arrest made in double shooting that killed man and 13-year-old boy in DeKalb County
news.summary: Authorities said shots were fired at a home on Rockcliff Road on July 2.

news.title: Arrest in Hampton for deadly DeKalb County slumber party shooting
news.summary: A 21-year-old man was arrested in Hampton in connection with the deadly shooting of a 13-year-old and a 45-year-old during a children’s slumber party.

news.title: 14 teens, 1 adult arrested linked to Urban Air burglary social media trend in Gwinnett County, police say
news.summary: Police said the trend encourages teens and young adults to enter the business unlawfully after hours to use arcade games, attractions and damage property.

news.title: Police release photos of man wanted for shooting that injured 3 in Atlanta
news.summary: ​The three victims were alert, breathing, and conscious before being transported to Grady Hospital for treatment.

news.title: Athens shooting leaves businesses damaged, 19-year-old arrested
news.summary: Athens-Clarke County police arrested a 19-year-old man after gunfire damaged multiple businesses in downtown Athens on Sunday.

news.title: Man arrested after allegedly shooting up Downtown Athens businesses
news.summary: Police in Athens said Tuesday that a 19-year-old man was arrested after allegedly firing in the area of 246 East Clayton Street.

news.title: Douglasville Police search for suspect accused of indecent exposure along Chapel Hill Road
news.summary: One of the incidents happened on June 13 at a Target on Chapel Hill Road.

news.title: Witnesses said gunfire was 'very common' from house where men were arrested after DeKalb DA's Office employee was hurt by celebratory shots
news.summary: Lakesha Davis, who works in the DeKalb County District Attorney's Office, was critically injured by celebratory gunfire on the Fourth of July.

news.title: 1 dead in shooting at apartment complex in Atlanta's Browns Mill Park neighborhood, police say
news.summary: Investigators have not released the victim's identity or any information about a possible suspect.

news.title: Atlanta man killed in July 4 shooting in Vidalia, GBI says
news.summary: Officers with the Vidalia Police Department arrived to find the victim lying in the roadway.

news.title: 16-year-old found dead days after Fourth of July shooting, police say
news.summary: Atlanta Police said they believe the 16-year-old found dead is the third victim of a shooting where two others were injured.
